title: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption
description: The system lacks mechanisms to prevent resource exhaustion, potentially leading to denial-of-service attacks. Without rate limiting, input validation, or proper resource management, an attacker could overwhelm the system with requests, causing it to crash or become unresponsive.
affected_component: Application Servers, Database Servers, Network Infrastructure
attack_vector: Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attacks, resource-intensive requests, or vulnerabilities in the application code.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting to restrict the number of requests from a single source.
Validate user inputs to prevent oversized or malicious data from consuming excessive resources.
Utilize a Content Delivery Network (CDN) to distribute traffic and mitigate DDoS attacks.
